summary: Iteration 93: Mobile responsive layout and content gating features tested. ALL TESTS PASS. Mobile layout: hamburger menu (data-testid=open-sidebar-btn), sidebar overlay (data-testid=sidebar-overlay), close button (data-testid=close-sidebar-btn), mobile top bar with logo and notification icon all working correctly. Desktop: sidebar permanently visible (288px width), hamburger hidden. Content gating: /trending-products, /top-trending-products, /trending-products-today, /trending-products-this-week, /trending-products-this-month, /category/:slug all show exactly 3 products with SignupGate for non-authenticated users. Public product page /p/:id shows 'Scores locked' gating. Authenticated users see all 50 products with no gate.
passed_tests: MOBILE: Dashboard has mobile top bar with hamburger menu (data-testid=open-sidebar-btn) at 390px width
MOBILE: Clicking hamburger opens sidebar overlay (data-testid=sidebar-overlay)
MOBILE: Sidebar shows all nav items (Dashboard, Product Analysis, Ad Intelligence, etc.) and X close button (data-testid=close-sidebar-btn)
MOBILE: Main content takes full width (390px) on mobile - no permanent sidebar
DESKTOP: Sidebar permanently visible at 1920px width (288px width, x=0)
DESKTOP: Hamburger button hidden on desktop
DESKTOP: Main content properly offset (x=288px, ml-72) for sidebar
GATING: /trending-products shows exactly 3 product cards for non-authenticated users
GATING: Signup gate appears after 3 products with 'Start Free Trial' (data-testid=gate-signup-btn) and 'Log in' (data-testid=gate-login-btn) buttons
GATING: /top-trending-products shows exactly 3 leaderboard items with gate ('47 more top products')
GATING: /trending-products-today shows exactly 3 products with gate
GATING: /trending-products-this-week shows exactly 3 products with gate
GATING: /trending-products-this-month shows exactly 3 products with gate
GATING: /category/beauty shows exactly 3 products with gate ('9 more Beauty products')
GATING: /p/:id public product page shows 'Scores locked', 'Supplier data locked', 'Competitor data locked', 'Ad activity locked'
AUTH: Authenticated user sees all 50 products on /trending-products (no gate)
AUTH: Authenticated user sees all 50 leaderboard items on /top-trending-products (no gate)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile responsive layout and content gating features fully verified. DashboardLayout.jsx correctly implements Tailwind lg: breakpoint (1024px) for mobile/desktop toggle. SignupGate component working on all public product listing pages. The onboarding wizard modal may appear on first login - can be dismissed with 'Skip walkthrough' link.

mobile_layout.sidebar_overlay: WORKING - data-testid=sidebar-overlay appears on hamburger click
mobile_layout.full_width_content: WORKING - main takes 100% width on mobile
